titleStmt.title: SII 37.44: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 44. (A.R. No. 334 of 1938-39.) Chemuḷḷapalle, Cuddapah Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in a field on the north side of the Cuddapah-Khazipet road.
This is dated Śaka 1461, Vikāri, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, corresponding to 1539 A.D., June 1, Sunday.

It records the formation of a village called Yallamāṁbāpuram in the division called Mulupāḷapolambu by Pāpināyamin-gāru, son of Goḍagumati Bhūmināyuḍu and Timmamāmba and named it after his wife Yallamāmba. He also built a temple for Vishṇu and consecrated the image of Kēśava therein, further he dug a well and planted a grove and made several other gifts in his wife's name. Pāpināyaniṁ-gāru is stated to the kāryakartta of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Salakarāju Peda Tirumalayyadēva-mahārāju who was the brother-in-law and the sarvasiraḥ-pradhāni of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svasti . śrī jayābhyudayaśālivāhana śakavarṣaṁ
bulu 1461 Agunēṁṭi vikāri saṁvatsara jēṣṭaśu 15 lu . śrī ma
drājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī Acyutarā
yamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁdduvajrasiṁhvāsanāsī
nuṁḍai pṛdhivi rājyaṁsēyucuṁḍaṁgānu yārāyalaku mara
ṁdinni sarvaśira pradhāniṁnni Aynadāna kṣātra samētulaina kāvērīvalla
bha kaṭakapraticūrakāra gajamulu talagoṁḍugaṁḍa tuṁbaḷagā
pa basava śaṁkaranavala tēluṁgaragaṁḍa voṁdāḍimaṁḍalikaragaṁ
ḍādi birudāṁkitulaina śrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara salaka rājupeda
tirumalayyadēvamahārājāluṁgāri sakala kāryakartalai
tadīyya kṛpāribda sāṁmrājya vaibhavōnnatulaina samayadrōha
ra gaṁḍāṁkulaina goḍagumati bhūmi nāyani komāḷlu
timmamāṁbāgarbhapuṇyōdayulaina pāpināyiniṁgāru ce
rnnūri sīma mōdalaina rājyaṁ yēlucunnu kulaśīlādigu
ṇasamanvitayena pativratāśirōratnamainatama dēvulu
yallamāṁbapēranu puṣpagiriki tūrpuna mulupāḷa
polāna yallamāṁbapuramanēgrāmamu gaṭṭiṁci vi
ṣṇu sdhānamu gaṭṭiṁci kēśavamūrtini pratiṣṭacēsi paśu
pakṣinaramṛgajīva sādhanamai Agādhajalōpēta yaina
bāvidravviṁccivanamunu vēyiṁci jagatpra siddhigānu
yallamāṁbavāripēranu marinni Anaṁttālaina dharmā
lu sēyiṁstunnu vēIṁcina dharma śāsanamu .
vanamunu guḍiyunu ceruvunu tanayu
braṁhma pratiṣṭadhana nikṣēpaṁbunu modalu saṁ
tatulaina ṁḍu bhūmarpanu pāpaṁḍivaninuka
cenu . maṁgaḷamahā śrīśrīśrīṁjēyunu .
Digital edition of SII 37.44 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
